name: ClientPulse

pricing_tiers.notes: All features including SSO and LinkedIn enrichment included on all tiers
Dedicated CSM, custom SLA, priority support

features: native LinkedIn Sales Navigator enrichment (one-click contact import)
unlimited email sequences with A/B testing
Outlook and Gmail native integration (bidirectional sync)
customisable pipeline stages with automation triggers
mobile app (iOS and Android, stable release)
real-time pipeline reporting and quota tracking
known_limitations: Migration complexity rated HIGH by vendor — estimated 20 working hours for full data migration from NexusCRM including pipeline history
No built-in CPQ or quote generation
Vendor-assisted onboarding required for SSO setup (adds to migration time)
notes: UK-headquartered vendor. Strong fit for consulting CRM needs but high migration complexity. At 22 seats, Professional tier = £418/mo vs NexusCRM £510/mo = £92/mo saving (£1,104/yr). Migration at 20hrs × £48 = £960 one-time, amortised £320/yr. Net = £784/yr — below £1,200 threshold. Switch case depends on operational gains (LinkedIn enrichment, Outlook native, mobile stability).
